nasb.text: And David spoke the words of this song to the Lord in the day that the Lord delivered him from the hand of all his enemies and from the hand of Saul.

esv.text: And David spoke to the Lord the words of this song on the day when the Lord delivered him from the hand of all his enemies, and from the hand of Saul.

cnv.text: 在耶和華拯救大衛脫離所有仇敵和掃羅的手的日子，他向耶和華唱出這首歌的歌詞。

ccb.text: 耶和华从扫罗和所有仇敌手中拯救大卫那天，他向耶和华吟唱此诗：
